name: cep_exp_boundary_leak
drl: rule R when exists E1() P() then end
_finding: D-152 (D-133 boundary corrected): an event whose deadline (endTs+@expires+1) is NEGATIVE never schedules an expiration — DROOLS-455 maps a negative effectiveEnd to Long.MAX_VALUE (never). E1(ts=-300, deadline -199) is IMMORTAL: it survives advance 500 and satisfies the exists forever — P2 inserted later fresh-fires [2]. Oracle xq1.
